title: No Beacon Particles
description: Gets rid of the swirl particles from ambient status effects given by beacons and conduits. Server OR Client-side!
body:
# 😵‍💫 No Beacon Particles
![A comparison between No Beacon Particles on the left and Vanilla on the right. No particles are visible on the left, while the right is covered in translucent entity effect swirls.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YRhAaADn/images/a9996b4921f8266fc74f910c5e35dcf311df6d95.png)
# 💎 Features
- **Removes ambient particles** created by Beacons & Conduits.
- **Server-side OR Client-side**, allowing compatibility with Vanilla in both ways.
- **Supports Mods** that generate particles through ambient effects.
